title: Convert to Base -2
hints: Think about standard base conversion using division and remainders. How does a negative base change how you handle negative remainders?
When dividing by a negative number, a negative remainder requires adjusting the quotient up by one to keep the remainder positive.
Use the relation N = q * (-2) + r. If r is negative, set r to 1 and increment q by 1 before repeating the process.
